prose.overview: Bangsai Country Club is one of the Bangkok region's great budget finds — a 27-hole parkland complex in rural Ayutthaya province that offers genuinely enjoyable golf at some of the lowest green fees in the vicinity of the capital. Opened in 1996 and designed by Thai course architect Pirapon Namatra of Golf East, the course stretches across open countryside 55 kilometres north of Bangkok and has earned a reputation as an accessible, affordable club that punches well above its price point. The 27 holes offer variety through three rotating nine-hole combinations, meaning each visit can deliver a different 18-hole combination. Facilities — gourmet restaurant, spacious locker rooms, driving range, and parking — are comprehensive and well maintained. Special rates for seniors, ladies, and juniors reinforce its community-oriented ethos.
prose.layout_and_experience: Bangsai's 27 holes spread across gently rolling open farmland that rises and falls by 7–23 feet above sea level — modest by hill country standards, but enough to add genuine variety to approach shots. The terrain is framed by lateral water hazards that feature on 11 of the 27 holes, requiring careful club selection and tee-shot discipline. A distinctive design feature on the third, fourth, and fifth holes sees giant sand dunes serving as waste bunkers rather than traditional sand traps, creating an unusual strategic dimension. Fairways are generally generous but the semi-rough is punishing. The combination courses all measure around 6,700–6,900 yards, offering a genuine challenge from the back tees. Greens are medium-paced with subtle breaks, and the overall experience rewards course management over power. The open countryside location means wind can be a significant factor, particularly in the dry season. The driving range provides a useful warm-up facility.
prose.tips: Bangsai is one of the best-value 18-hole rounds within 70 minutes of Bangkok — weekday green fees as low as 750 THB, making it ideal for those on a tighter budget or for high-volume golfers wanting multiple rounds. Confirm current cart and caddie fee rates directly when booking (phone: +66 35 371 491), as these are not widely published online. The course is open daily. Advance booking of at least 1 day is recommended on weekdays and 2 days on weekends. Allow approximately 70–80 minutes travel from central Bangkok heading north via Expressway Route 9 or the Vibhavadi Rangsit Road. The Ayutthaya historical sites are nearby for those wishing to combine golf with sightseeing.
prose.location_and_access: Bangsai Country Club is located at 77 Samkhok-Sena Road, Bang Phli, Bang Sai District, Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya 13190, approximately 55 km north of central Bangkok. The journey by car or taxi via the Expressway takes around 70 minutes off-peak. The course sits in open countryside between Bangkok and the historic city of Ayutthaya. Grab cars reach the area but the rural location means advance arrangement of return transport is advisable.
prose.rental_cta_context: Making the trip north to Bangsai Country Club? LENGOLF delivers quality rental clubs to Bangkok hotels, keeping your baggage light and your golf budget flexible.

verification_notes: 27-hole layout. GPS confirmed by golfbangkok.com. Designer Golf East (Pirapon Namatra) from golfbangkok.com. Fee discrepancy between 1golf.eu (750/1,550) and golfsavers (1,000/1,200). 1golf.eu used as primary.
disputes: Weekday fee: 1golf.eu 750 THB vs golfsavers 1,000 THB (33% diff). Weekend: 1golf.eu 1,550 vs golfsavers 1,200. Recommend confirming directly.
